item.title: Robotic Inspection Platform Combines AI Defect Detection with Precision Surface Metrology
item.description: AURA's integration of the 4D InSpec provides a new turnkey robotic inspection platform combining AI defect detection with precision surface metrology, enhancing automated industrial quality control.

item.title: Audi Expands AR-Based Visual Inspection
item.description: Audi's expansion of the AR-based SuPAR visual inspection solution demonstrates growing automotive market adoption of augmented reality for streamlining production defect detection.

item.title: UTEX Scientific Announces Acquisition of PA-CAT Inc. from Holloway NDT & Engineering
item.description: UTEX Scientific's acquisition of PA-CAT Inc. consolidates the nondestructive testing market by expanding its automated inspection systems portfolio.

item.title: Invisix Raises €20M Seed Round to Advance Soft X-Ray Semiconductor Metrology
item.description: Invisix's successful €20M seed round, backed by Hitachi, highlights significant market investment and growth in advanced soft X-ray semiconductor metrology solutions.

item.title: Teledyne AxCIS Contact Image Sensors
item.description: Teledyne DALSA expanded its AxCIS™ family of fully integrated line scan imaging modules, enhancing high-speed defect inspection capabilities for machine vision applications.

item.title: Laser Projection Technology Reduces Errors While Improving Manufacturing Quality
item.description: SL Laser expands laser projection technology in manufacturing with new solutions to improve positioning accuracy, reduce setup times, and eliminate manual production errors.

item.title: Plug-and-Play AI Inspection System Simplifies Industrial Quality Control
item.description: A new plug-and-play AI inspection system was released to simplify and automate industrial quality control for manufacturing.
